sidebarFilepicker.name: Enable Filepicker Sidebar Tab
sidebarFilepicker.hint: Add a new tab to the sidebar that allows you to browse and upload files, as well as drag and drop images/3D Models onto the scene.

placeastokens.name: Place images as Tokens
placeastokens.hint: When dragging an image onto the scene, place it as a token instead of a tile if you are on the token layer (sidebar picker only)

imagepreview.name: Image-Video Preview
imagepreview.hint: Display the image or video preview when hovering over them in the filepicker

threepreview.name: 3D Preview
threepreview.hint: Show 3D Previews, requires 3D Portraits. If this setting is disabled, the 3D File Thumbnail will be used instead (if present).

audiopreview.name: Audio Preview
audiopreview.hint: Play an audio preview when hovering over sounds in the file picker

audiopreviewdelay.name: Audio Preview Delay
audiopreviewdelay.hint: Delay in ms before the preview sound starts playing

enablecolortheme.name: Enable Color Theme
enablecolortheme.hint: Enable the dark color theme for the filepicker, if you have a module or system that applies a theme to the filepicker, you might want to disable this.

sidebar.no-filepicker: The File Browser is open in a separate window. The File Browser will return to the sidebar once the window is closed.
sidebar.open: The File Browser sidebar is active, the selected File Browser was opened in the sidebar.
